calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-19-2010 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jul-19-2010 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 to place the terms of the agreement of the parties on the record.
Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Plaintiff Louis A. Gage was present in pro per, placed under oath and examined.
Defendant Michael Sherman was present in pro per, placed under oath and examined.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on July 1, 2010.

Terms of the agreement were placed on the record by Mr. Gage. In accordance with the termes agreed upon by the parties, judgment for plaintiff shall be entered as follows:

Past-Due Rent - $15,100.00.

Additionally, plaintiff Louis A. Gage is entitled to Restitution and Possession of the subject premises located at 372 Baker Street, #106, San Francisco, CA by 5:00 p.m. on August 31, 2010. The lease agreement is forfeited. Defendant Michael Sherman has until September 3, 2010 to remove his personal property from the subject premises. A Writ of Execution for Possession of the subject shall issue forthwith, but is stayed until August 31, 2010 @ 5:00 p.m. If defendant does not remove his personal property from the subject premises by September 3, 2010, daily damages of $43.33 shall accrue.

Both parties were voir dired by the Court as to the terms and their understanding of the agreement.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-14-2010 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge: Ricahrd Ulmer; Clerk NBautista ; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Plaintiff, Louis Gage is present.
Plaintiff is in Pro Per.
Defendant, Michael Sherman, is present.
Attorney, Robert Kane , representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem , litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 305B, for settlement discussions.
This case did NOT settle.
The trial date of JUL-19-2010 remains on calendar.
